about.lead: Swedish-American. Raised in Boise. Studying in Madison. Moving to the Bay.
paragraphs: I build the thing, break the thing, figure out why it broke, rebuild it better. That loop is most of who I am as an engineer.

Right now that looks like thaw — a fork primitive for LLM inference written in ~9,400 lines of Rust with Python bindings, shipped to PyPI, integrated against vLLM and SGLang, validated on H100 and A100 pods. Before thaw: a distributed message queue from scratch in Go, a real-time collaborative engine in Rust with CRDTs, an ML pipeline beating official schedules for my hometown bus grid.
Outside of shipping: Ableton, guitar, long runs, Swedish, skiing. The thread is the same everywhere — iteration, attention to detail, caring about how things actually work under the surface.

projects.title: thaw
projects.subtitle: the fork primitive for live LLM inference
projects.description: Co-founder + lead engineer. 9,424 lines of Rust across 5 crates, Python bindings via PyO3, integrations with vLLM and SGLang. Snapshot a running LLM session — weights, KV cache, scheduler state — and hydrate N divergent children that skip prefill.
projects.receipt: 0.88s per fork round on H100 8B · 400× amortized vs cold boot

projects.title: Sentinel
projects.subtitle: distributed log streaming engine
projects.description: High-throughput message queue written from scratch in Go. Custom LSM-tree storage, Raft-inspired leader election, gRPC streaming API, Kafka-style topic primitives. 5,600 lines, 21 tests, benchmarked end-to-end.

projects.title: Synapse
projects.subtitle: real-time collaborative whiteboard
projects.description: Conflict-free collaborative workspace built for 50+ concurrent users. Rust (Actix) WebSocket server, CRDTs via Yjs, WebAssembly rendering, Redis pub/sub for horizontal scale.

projects.title: Madison Metro Bus ETA
projects.subtitle: end-to-end ml pipeline
projects.description: ML pipeline predicting Madison bus arrivals more accurately than the official schedule. GTFS-RT ingestion into Postgres/PostGIS, LSTM + Transformer models, Docker + CI/CD, live dashboard.

projects.title: LockBox
projects.subtitle: offline password manager
projects.description: Fully offline, local-first password manager in Python + PyQt6. AES-256-GCM with Argon2id KDF (64 MB memory cost), TOTP 2FA, DPAPI quick-unlock, single-exe distribution with zero runtime deps.
projects.receipt: zero cloud · zero telemetry · zero runtime deps

projects.title: Aura
projects.subtitle: 3d audio-reactive visual engine
projects.description: Generative art experience syncing volumetric 3D visuals with live audio. Web Audio FFT piped into Three.js shader uniforms, custom GLSL ray-marching, Whisper for transcription, Stable Diffusion for texture synthesis.
projects.receipt: 60 FPS · ray-marched volumetric light · runs in-browser

education.degree: B.S. Computer Science + B.S. Data Science
highlights: Coursework: Systems Programming, Machine Learning, Distributed Systems, Deep Learning, Databases, Statistical Inference
Senior thesis track — applied ML infrastructure

education.location: San Jose, CA — Silicon Valley campus

contact.heading: let's talk.
contact.body: I'm full-time on thaw, heading to the Bay this fall, and open to research collaborations, SWE / MLE internship intros for 2027, and any conversation involving GPU inference, distributed systems, or ML infrastructure.
